text: Stepping through the sterile hallway and into this bright, visually electric exhibit space, I feel a sense of anticipation—a spark that only new knowledge and unknown possibilities can ignite. The words on the wall urge me to see the world as an evolving experiment, where wonder is found in the act of observing. Here, in this confluence of research and creative display, my mind is invited to play. I am humbled and a little exhilarated, aware that every detail may reveal new insight if I pause to truly see.
